summary: The diff shows modifications to the Portfolio component that reduce the number of gallery images from 60 to 9 (3 per category instead of 20 per category). The component includes enhanced error handling and debugging console logs, but only implements a subset of the required 60 images. No evidence of debugging the original 60-image issue or verifying/regenerating the missing images is present in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Debug and identify the root cause of why the 60 gallery images are not loading, examining image path construction, file existence checks, and path resolution issues
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the Portfolio component was modified to use only 9 images instead of debugging why the original 60 images were not loading. No documentation or comments explain the root cause analysis or findings about the original image loading failure.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the Portfolio component to correctly load and display all 60 gallery images (residential-1 through residential-20, commercial-1 through commercial-20, before-after-1 through before-after-20)
missing_requirements.reason: The Portfolio component now defines only 9 projects total (3 residential, 3 commercial, 3 before-after) instead of the required 60 images (20 per category). The projects array shows only residential-1/2/3, commercial-1/2/3, and before-after-1/2/3.

missing_requirements.requirement: Verify that all 60 gallery images exist as static assets in the frontend/public/assets/generated directory and regenerate any missing image files
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence in the diff shows verification of the 60 image files or regeneration of missing images. The component code mentions validation logic but only references 3 images per category, not the required 20 per category.

hallucinated_features.description: Reduction of gallery images from 60 to 9 total (3 per category instead of 20 per category)
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly requires all 60 gallery images (residential-1 through residential-20, commercial-1 through commercial-20, before-after-1 through before-after-20) and includes a constraint to not regenerate all 60 gallery images unless absolutely necessary, implying they should remain at 60. The diff shows only 9 images are now configured.

hallucinated_features.description: Image path modification to include .dim_1200x800 in filenames
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies exact filenames like residential-1.png, but the diff shows paths like residential-1.dim_1200x800.png, which changes the filename scheme beyond what was requested.
